ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot expressing a sense of forlornness and slight apprehension when encountering a derelict house.  The robot will initially have its arms crossed protectively, then slowly raise one arm as if reaching out to investigate, before returning to a more guarded posture.  The movements are slow and deliberate, reflecting the cautious nature of exploring an abandoned place. The use of the dual shoulder joints allows for expressive, non-robotic arm movements.

frames.beat: arms crossed protectively, a cautious approach
right arm begins to reach out, hesitant exploration
the right arm probes further, a tentative investigation
arms return to a guarded, crossed position
